title: Iran War Live Updates: Rubio Signals No Letup in U.S. Strikes
summary_full: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said that the United States would continue attacking Iran as long as it tried to control the Strait of Hormuz, and suggested that Tehran was “not serious” about diplomacy.
summary_public: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said that the United States would continue attacking Iran as long as it tried to control the Strait of Hormuz, and suggested that Tehran was “not serious” about diplomacy.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran tried to control the Strait of Hormuz
